noCompanies.title: Create your first company
noCompanies.description: Get started by creating a company.

account.viewProfileDescription: Open your activity, task, and usage ledger.
account.editProfileDescription: Update your display name and avatar.
account.documentationDescription: Open Paperclip docs in a new tab.
account.feedbackDescription: Share feedback or report an issue.
account.languageDescription: Choose the display language for this browser.

auth.signInDescription: Use your email and password to access this instance.
auth.signUpDescription: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
auth.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
auth.name: Name

dashboard.welcome: Welcome to Paperclip. Set up your first company and agent to get started.
dashboard.selectCompany: Create or select a company to view the dashboard.
dashboard.budgetIncidentSummary: {{agents}} agents paused · {{projects}} projects paused · {{approvals}} pending budget approvals

tasks.selectCompany: Select a company to view tasks.
tasks.chooseColumns: Choose which task columns stay visible
tasks.noMatch: No tasks match the current filters or search.
tasks.showingMatches: Showing up to {{count}} matches. Refine the search to narrow further.
tasks.boardLimit: Some board columns are showing up to {{count}} tasks. Refine filters or search to reveal the rest.

agents.selectCompany: Select a company to view agents.
agents.empty: Create your first agent to get started.
agents.noMatch: No agents match the selected status.

projects.selectCompany: Select a company to view projects.

goals.selectCompany: Select a company to view goals.

org.selectCompany: Select a company to view org chart.
org.empty: No agents in the organization. Create agents to build your org chart.

activity.selectCompany: Select a company to view activity.

inbox.selectCompany: Select a company to view inbox.
inbox.noSearchMatch: No inbox items match your search.
inbox.noFilterMatch: No inbox items match these filters.
inbox.chooseColumns: Choose which inbox columns stay visible
inbox.markAllReadDescription: This will mark {{count}} unread items as read.

routines.selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
routines.advancedDescription: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
routines.empty: No active routines. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
routines.description: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution tasks.
routines.newDescription: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
routines.afterCreation: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.

costs.selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.
costs.selectDateRange: Select a start and end date to load data.
costs.description: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
costs.inferenceLedgerDescription: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
costs.monthlyUsage: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.
costs.byAgentDescription: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
costs.byProjectDescription: Run costs attributed through project-linked tasks.
costs.financeLedgerDescription: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
costs.netDescription: Debit minus credit for the selected period
costs.estimatedDescription: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
costs.budgetControlDescription: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate under Providers.
costs.openThresholds: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
costs.overrideApprovals: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
costs.incidentDescription: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.

agentDetail.membershipLeft: You left this agent. It no longer appears in your sidebar.
agentDetail.invalidReportingChainDescription: {{name}} cannot accept tasks or start runs until its reporting chain is repaired.
agentDetail.invalidReportingChainGuidance: Assign this agent to an active manager/root, or explicitly pause or terminate the affected agent/subtree.
agentDetail.repairBeforeWork: Repair this agent's reporting chain before assigning tasks or starting runs
agentDetail.pendingApproval: This agent is pending board approval and cannot be invoked yet.

generalPage.description: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
generalPage.localTrustedDescription: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
generalPage.publicAuthDescription: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
generalPage.privateAuthDescription: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
generalPage.censorUsernameDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
generalPage.keyboardShortcutsDescription: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating tasks or toggling panels. This is off by default.
generalPage.backupRetentionDescription: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
generalPage.aiFeedbackSharingDescription: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
generalPage.noFeedbackDefault: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
generalPage.dontAllowDescription: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
generalPage.feedbackDevHint: To retest the first-use prompt in local development, reset feedbackDataSharingPreference to prompt in instance_settings.general.
generalPage.signOutDescription: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

profilePage.selectCompanyBeforeUpload: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.
profilePage.storedForCompany: Stored in Paperclip file storage for {{name}}.
profilePage.selectCompanyForAvatar: Select a company to upload an avatar into Paperclip storage.
profilePage.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profilePage.clickAvatar: Click the avatar to upload a new image.
profilePage.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
profilePage.emailHint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.

accessPage.adminRequired: Instance admin access is required to manage users.
accessPage.title: Instance Access
accessPage.description: Search users, manage instance-admin status, and control which companies they can access.
accessPage.selectUser: Select a user to inspect instance access.
accessPage.companyAccessDescription: Toggle company membership for this user. New access defaults to an active operator membership.

heartbeatsPage.disableManyFailed: Failed to disable {{failures}} of {{enabled}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}
heartbeatsPage.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
heartbeatsPage.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
heartbeatsPage.disableConfirm: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
heartbeatsPage.empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

companySettings.title: Company Settings
companySettings.newHireApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
companySettings.noCompany: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
companySettings.companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
companySettings.descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
companySettings.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
companySettings.brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
companySettings.attachmentInvalid: Enter a whole number from 1 to {{max}}.
companySettings.requireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
companySettings.packagesMoved: Import and export are available from the Org Chart header.
companySettings.packagesMovedPrefix: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the
companySettings.archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
companySettings.archiveConfirm: Archive company “{{name}}”? It will be hidden from the sidebar.
